records.m_Talk_ENG: You look confused.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You look confused.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You look confused.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ahab...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ahab...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ahab...

records.m_Talk_ENG: We... The Administration...
records.m_Talk_DEU: We... The Administration...
records.m_Talk_FRA: We... The Administration...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, my. Are you still trying to recall your memories?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, my. Are you still trying to recall your memories?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, my. Are you still trying to recall your memories?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Unfortunately, erased memories do not come back so easily.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Unfortunately, erased memories do not come back so easily.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Unfortunately, erased memories do not come back so easily.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Luckily, however, we have all the memories you are searching for.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Luckily, however, we have all the memories you are searching for.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Luckily, however, we have all the memories you are searching for.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We have kept them safe for you... to join us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We have kept them safe for you... to join us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We have kept them safe for you... to join us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We are ready to embrace you with open arms.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We are ready to embrace you with open arms.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We are ready to embrace you with open arms.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You don't know how long we've waited for you to wake up...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You don't know how long we've waited for you to wake up...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You don't know how long we've waited for you to wake up...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You knew I was in a cryogenic state?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You knew I was in a cryogenic state?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You knew I was in a cryogenic state?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We were able to figure it out by detecting that your presence had disappeared.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We were able to figure it out by detecting that your presence had disappeared.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We were able to figure it out by detecting that your presence had disappeared.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We were once beasts, but your words had brought us back to our senses.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We were once beasts, but your words had brought us back to our senses.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We were once beasts, but your words had brought us back to our senses.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Your exact words were, <color=#ffd34c>"All names contain power."</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: Your exact words were, <color=#ffd34c>"All names contain power."</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: Your exact words were, <color=#ffd34c>"All names contain power."</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>"We are those who have gathered to purify the world from darkness."</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>"We are those who have gathered to purify the world from darkness."</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>"We are those who have gathered to purify the world from darkness."</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: So that's why there was a sandstorm when I woke up...
records.m_Talk_DEU: So that's why there was a sandstorm when I woke up...
records.m_Talk_FRA: So that's why there was a sandstorm when I woke up...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Traversing from the imaginary space to the Normalside creates a strong recoil.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Traversing from the imaginary space to the Normalside creates a strong recoil.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Traversing from the imaginary space to the Normalside creates a strong recoil.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you no longer hiding the fact that you're a C.O. now?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you no longer hiding the fact that you're a C.O. now?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you no longer hiding the fact that you're a C.O. now?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's not that I didn't hide it. It is merely a choice I made to not leave you alone anymore.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's not that I didn't hide it. It is merely a choice I made to not leave you alone anymore.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's not that I didn't hide it. It is merely a choice I made to not leave you alone anymore.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It is also the reason why I swallowed the impurity that was beside you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It is also the reason why I swallowed the impurity that was beside you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It is also the reason why I swallowed the impurity that was beside you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The impurity beside me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The impurity beside me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The impurity beside me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Asha!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Asha!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Asha!

records.m_Talk_ENG: How dare this unworthy girl stand beside our sun? The absurdity!
records.m_Talk_DEU: How dare this unworthy girl stand beside our sun? The absurdity!
records.m_Talk_FRA: How dare this unworthy girl stand beside our sun? The absurdity!

records.m_Talk_ENG: However, that impurity has one item related to you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: However, that impurity has one item related to you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: However, that impurity has one item related to you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This would have been a lot easier if she was here and also accepted us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This would have been a lot easier if she was here and also accepted us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This would have been a lot easier if she was here and also accepted us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shut up, C.O. Is Asha still alive?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shut up, C.O. Is Asha still alive?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shut up, C.O. Is Asha still alive?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That impurity has... refused to be eternally happy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That impurity has... refused to be eternally happy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That impurity has... refused to be eternally happy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If she had given us the compass, she would have lost nothing and lived in a bountiful world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If she had given us the compass, she would have lost nothing and lived in a bountiful world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If she had given us the compass, she would have lost nothing and lived in a bountiful world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It may be a coincidence, but that impurity seems to have your grace.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It may be a coincidence, but that impurity seems to have your grace.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It may be a coincidence, but that impurity seems to have your grace.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A test you gave us to see <color=#ff3636>if we are worthy of the name Ravi</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A test you gave us to see <color=#ff3636>if we are worthy of the name Ravi</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A test you gave us to see <color=#ff3636>if we are worthy of the name Ravi</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We will make sure to not let you down.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We will make sure to not let you down.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We will make sure to not let you down.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, but that doesn't mean that we have any intention of harming her body.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, but that doesn't mean that we have any intention of harming her body.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, but that doesn't mean that we have any intention of harming her body.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
We will preserve the impurity's body in its original form
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
We will preserve the impurity's body in its original form
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
We will preserve the impurity's body in its original form
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh. Have you gotten attached to that impurity?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh. Have you gotten attached to that impurity?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh. Have you gotten attached to that impurity?

records.m_Talk_ENG: As expected, there is no use talking to C.O.s, so I chose a better means of communication.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As expected, there is no use talking to C.O.s, so I chose a better means of communication.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As expected, there is no use talking to C.O.s, so I chose a better means of communication.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Attached... yes. She did grow on me. Asha's not really someone you get tired of.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Attached... yes. She did grow on me. Asha's not really someone you get tired of.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Attached... yes. She did grow on me. Asha's not really someone you get tired of.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She's a strong kid.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She's a strong kid.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She's a strong kid.

records.m_Talk_ENG: R... un, Miss Aditya...
records.m_Talk_DEU: R... un, Miss Aditya...
records.m_Talk_FRA: R... un, Miss Aditya...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Life is important... remember...?94p
records.m_Talk_DEU: Life is important... remember...?94p
records.m_Talk_FRA: Life is important... remember...?94p

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Ravi's daughter, Asha.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Ravi's daughter, Asha.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Ravi's daughter, Asha.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I will not lose those precious to me... through my own fault ever again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I will not lose those precious to me... through my own fault ever again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I will not lose those precious to me... through my own fault ever again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I must save Asha. Even if it means my death.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I must save Asha. Even if it means my death.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I must save Asha. Even if it means my death.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Seems that you're all alone again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Seems that you're all alone again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Seems that you're all alone again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A natural outcome.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A natural outcome.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A natural outcome.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This one is fated to always be alone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This one is fated to always be alone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This one is fated to always be alone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. Even now, the situation forces her to be alone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. Even now, the situation forces her to be alone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. Even now, the situation forces her to be alone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: At this rate, that child will die in her own hands.
records.m_Talk_DEU: At this rate, that child will die in her own hands.
records.m_Talk_FRA: At this rate, that child will die in her own hands.

records.m_Talk_ENG: For anyone who gets too close to the sun will eventually burn.94p
records.m_Talk_DEU: For anyone who gets too close to the sun will eventually burn.94p
records.m_Talk_FRA: For anyone who gets too close to the sun will eventually burn.94p

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I am fated to be alone... then the least I can do is not let my comrades get hurt.

records.m_Talk_FRA: If I am fated to be alone... then the least I can do is not let my comrades get hurt.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...If you refuse to accept us, then very well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...If you refuse to accept us, then very well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...If you refuse to accept us, then very well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ravi's name and your joining are both possible after absorbing you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ravi's name and your joining are both possible after absorbing you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ravi's name and your joining are both possible after absorbing you.
